ingredients.item:
vegetable oil
6 large onions
800g (1lb 12oz) boneless lamb neck fillets, cut into 2.5cm (1in) chunks
1 tbsp green cardamom pods
6 black cardamom pods
4 bay leaves
2 tsp turmeric
2 tbsp cumin seeds
4 cinnamon sticks, each 7cm (3in) long
200g (7oz) Greek yogurt
sea salt
600g (1lb 5oz) basmati rice
2 generous pinches of saffron threads (optional)
2 tsp boiling water
125g (4½oz) butter
ingredients.original:
vegetable oil
6 large onions
800g (1lb 12oz) boneless lamb neck fillets, cut into 2.5cm (1in) chunks
1 tbsp green cardamom pods
6 black cardamom pods
4 bay leaves
2 tsp turmeric
2 tbsp cumin seeds
4 cinnamon sticks, each 7cm (3in) long
200g (7oz) Greek yogurt
sea salt
600g (1lb 5oz) basmati rice
2 generous pinches of saffron threads (optional)
2 tsp boiling water
125g (4½oz) butter

ingredients.item: Preheat a large saucepan over a medium-high heat and pour in 250ml (9fl oz) vegetable oil. Chop 4 of the onions in half, then thinly slice into 5mm- (¼in-) thick half moons. Fry the onion slices in the oil (there should be just enough oil to cover them, so add more oil if needed), stirring every few minutes, until they are golden brown and crispy. Using a slotted spoon, drain the onions on to a plate lined with kitchen paper and set aside.

Fry the onion slices in the oil (there should be just enough oil to cover them, so add more oil if needed), stirring every few minutes, until they are golden brown and crispy. Using a slotted spoon, drain the onions on to a plate lined with kitchen paper and set aside.
